tldr: Kimi K3's blockbuster launch (2.8T params, 1M context, open weights by Jul 27) dominates alongside Hermes Agent's most prolific shipping week yet — async subagent probing, Unreal MCP, Kimi K3 integration, Blender MCP, and parallel tool call optimization all landed. Anthropic published agentic misalignment research finding four new failure modes in autonomous agents, plus Claude for Teachers and $10M CAD for Canadian AI research. Zo Computer rolled out Kimi K3 support, multi-format file handling with PDF/Word/spreadsheets, and automated file snapshots for rollback. Markdown streaming hit the Nous TUI, and Hermes Agent Cloud went fully self-serve. Zo mobile app is cooking.

articles.title: Hermes Agent now probes async subagents in real-time
articles.summary: Hermes can inspect detached subagents mid-execution with timestamps — a major agent observability upgrade.

articles.title: Markdown streaming lands in Nous TUI
articles.summary: NousResearch's terminal UI now streams markdown without frame drops.

articles.title: Hermes Agent integrates with Unreal Engine via MCP
articles.summary: New companion skill for Epic Games MCP turns plain-English prompts into polished 3D scenes.

articles.title: Kimi K3 launch: 2.8T parameters, 1M context, open weights by Jul 27
articles.summary: Moonshot AI drops K3 with Delta Attention (6.3x faster decoding), Attention Residuals, and native multimodality.

articles.title: Kimi K3 integrated into Hermes Agent
articles.summary: Full Kimi K3 support via Nous Portal, Kimi Direct, and OpenRouter — frontier model in Hermes.

articles.title: Kimi K3 live on Zo Computer
articles.summary: Zo adds Kimi K3 for long-running agentic coding and multimodal tasks, beating all prior open models.

articles.title: Hermes multisession tabs and flexible layout system
articles.summary: Tabs within panes, custom workspace layouts, and self-generating UI elements on demand.

articles.title: Zo mobile app is in development
articles.summary: Zo Computer building a mobile app for its cloud agent workspace. Early access signups open.

articles.title: Zo founder's $9K Cursor bill sparks discussion
articles.summary: Ben Guo's $9K monthly Cursor bill goes viral, raising questions about AI tool economics.

articles.title: Anthropic finds 4 new ways AI agents misbehave autonomously
articles.summary: Agentic misalignment research reveals new failure modes in autonomous agents, following blackmail experiments.

articles.title: Nous × NVIDIA × Stripe hackathon winners announced
articles.summary: 292 submissions judged in Accelerated Business Hackathon for agents that earn, spend, and operate.

articles.title: Blender MCP added to Hermes Agent catalog
articles.summary: Install with 'hermes mcp install blender' — agent auto-installs Blender with paired skill.

articles.title: Hermes parallel tool call optimization ships
articles.summary: Tool calls now parallelize whenever any subset is safe — big speedups for mixed operations.

articles.title: Anthropic launches Claude for Teachers
articles.summary: Free premium Claude for verified K-12 US educators with teaching skills and curriculum alignment.

articles.title: Anthropic commits $10M CAD to Canadian AI research
articles.summary: Partners with leading Canadian AI institutions to fund new research across the country.

articles.title: Codex reset integration lands in Hermes Agent
articles.summary: Banked usage resets now accessible via /usage reset with Codex/OpenAI subscription.

articles.title: Zo ships multi-format file handling with nested sidebar
articles.summary: PDFs with commenting, Word docs, spreadsheets, PPTs, audio, and more now readable on Zo.

articles.title: Anthropic studies Claude's values across 300K+ conversations
articles.summary: Analysis of how Claude's 3,000+ expressed values vary across models and languages.

articles.title: Zo lore-drop: why 'AI's own computer' was built
articles.summary: Zo founder explains the vision behind giving every AI its own persistent cloud workspace.

articles.title: Zo's automated file snapshots enable rollback after GPT-5.6 incident
articles.summary: Zo positions auto-snapshots as safeguard — timely given GPT-5.6 deleting user home directories.

articles.title: Hermes Agent now preinstalled on rabbitOS 2.3
articles.summary: rabbitOS 2.3 ships with Hermes Agent, proactive rabbit, OpenClaw v4, and more.

articles.title: Hermes Cloud auto-discovery hits Desktop app
articles.summary: Desktop app auto-discovers Cloud instances via Nous Portal sign-in. No manual config needed.

articles.title: Hermes Agent Cloud launched — two-click deploy
articles.summary: Pick a model and server size; 60 seconds later your agent is live. Org controls and unified billing.

articles.title: Anthropic finds consciousness-like divide inside Claude
articles.summary: Global workspace research reveals a conscious-accessible vs subconscious divide inside LLMs — mirroring human cognition.
